name: Ann's Pesto
recipeIngredient: Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the basil, garlic, and pine nuts to a food processor and pulse until finely chopped.
2. With the processor running, slowly add the olive oil in a thin, steady stream.
3. Add the Parmesan and Pecorino Romano cheeses, salt, and black pepper. Pulse briefly to combine.
Yield: 2 cups prepared pesto.
(I make this in 2-cup batches and freeze them in half-pint canning jars for the winter. Use on pasta, vegetables, baked potatoes... MJ)
